name: Transtech Optelecom Science Holdings Limited
summary: Transtech Optelecom Science Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells optical fiber, optical fiber cables, and other products. The company offers optical fiber for use in telecommunication, medical, military, aerospace and various other applications; optical fiber cables under the Futong trademark; and optical fiber core and other related products, such as optical fiber coloring, secondary coating, and stranded cabling, as well as the tests. It has operations in the People's Republic of China, Thailand, Vietnam, Singapore, Laos, the Philippines, Burma, and internationally. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Tai Po, Hong Kong. Transtech Optelecom Science Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Futong Group Co., Ltd.
